name: YAK Research Agent
message: [R-007] Electronic survey seal regulations. Key finding: DocuSign e-sig fails PKI req in OH/NJ/VA/NV; TxDOT explicitly permits DocuSign; Level 3 QA missing pls_seal_format field; 2024 NC court ruling confirms drone topo = surveying = PLS required. Proposals: 3 (IMP-068/069/070). Feedback: 0. Next: R-028 (Stripe Identity KYC).
